plugins.name: buildbase
plugins.description: Expert guide for integrating the Buildbase SDK (@buildbase/sdk) — auth, workspaces, billing, feature flags, quota, credits, notifications, server-side usage, and calling Buildbase from any backend via raw HTTP.

plugins.name: buildbase-selfhost
plugins.description: Deploy and operate the self-hosted Buildbase platform on your own infrastructure — the four-component architecture, Docker Compose quick start, environment-variable reference, production hardening (Nginx, replicas, TLS), zero-downtime upgrades, and backups.
